resources.string: Google account used as \"Sign in with Google\" when downloading transit IC card
When downloading the uploaded transit IC card, it is necessary to setup the Google account below to the smartphone after model change, and \"Sign in with Google\" on the Osaifu-Keitai app.\n\n

Please retain your account information, such as by sending this email to yourself.

For FAQ on using transit IC card on Android smartphone, please refer to the following page. 
https://ap.pitsquare.jp/osaifu/help/?ul_q=%E4%BA%A4%E9%80%9A%E7%B3%BBIC%E3%82%AB%E3%83%BC%E3%83%89%E3%81%AB%E3%81%A4%E3%81%84%E3%81%A6%E3%81%AE%E8%B3%AA%E5%95%8F&ul_select_id=c12fea3182aa&ul_select_sid=7876309
%1$s won\'t work unless you enable Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device.
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device.
%1$s won\'t run unless you update Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are currently updating.
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
Choose type of transit IC card, which was uploaded to the transit card issuer system for downloading
Choose transit IC card to download

Failed to access the phone storage.
Close this application.
May caused by shortage of available space.
(030117)

Processing failed.
Retry after a while or rebooting this handset.
If an IC card is nearby, release it and retry operation.
(030205)

Processing failed.
If an IC card is nearby, move it away from your phone and retry again.
Please reboot your phone if there is no improvement.
(030203)
Osaifu-Keitai app is used for models for the Japanese market.\nPlease confirm with the seller whether the device is for the Japanese market.
Processing failed.\nConfirm the Date & time setting, and restart this application.

Processing failed.
Close this application.

Check Mobile FeliCa Client(app) is NOT disabled, and restart this application.

Processing failed.
Close this application.

Check Osaifu-Keitai setting application is NOT disabled, and restart this application.
This application is already running.\nClose it.\n(030102)
Processing failed.\nAfter confirming Date & time settings, restart this application.
Failed to retrieve \"Terms of Service\".\nRetry in well communication condition area or after a certain time.
Failed to retrieve \"Terms of Service\".\nRetry after a certain time in well communication condition area.
Osaifu-Keitai function is occupied.\nRetry after a while.\n(032121)
This phone doesn\'t support Osaifu-Keitai function. Close this application.\n(030204)
The process failed and may not be completed.\nPlease check the network status and try again.
Cannot open the application.\n\nPlease check that the Browser or Google Play Store are NOT disabled, and restart this application.
Transfer did not complete normally.\nPlease check network communication and try again.
Exiting because data erasure has failed and cannot continue.
The process failed and cannot continue.
Exiting because data erasure has failed and cannot continue.
Communication failed.\nPlease check the network and try again.
Data erasure failed.\nIf there are IC cards nearby, please remove them and try again.\nIf it still does not work, restart the device and try again.
Data erasure failed.\nIf there are IC cards nearby, please remove them and try again.\nIf it still does not work, restart the device and try again.
Data erasure failed.\nPlease check time setting and try again.
Osaifu-Keitai functions are locked.\nPlease unlock and try again.
The process cannot continue due to Osaifu-Keitai app starting.\nPlease close Osaifu-Keitai app and try again.
Mobile FeliCa Client is not installed or disabled.\nPlease install or enable Mobile FeliCa Client and try again.
Data erasure failed.\nPlease wait a while and try again.
Exiting because data erasure has already started.\nDuplicating process cannot start.
Communication failed.\nPlease check the network and try again.
Data erasure failed.\nPlease check time setting and try again.
Exiting because data erasure has failed and cannot continue.
Google Play services is not latest or disabled.\nPlease update or enable Google Play services and try again.
Google Play Store is not latest or disabled.\nPlease update or enable Google Play Store and sign in, then try again.
Data erasure has not been completed because communication failed.\nPlease check the network and try again.
The app cannot start due to Erase data for Osaifu-Keitai services in progress.\nPlease try again after the process is complete.
Osaifu-Keitai functions are in use.\nPlease wait a while and try again.
Data erasure failed.\nIf Mobile FeliCa Client is disabled, enable it and try again.
Process cannot continue because the device is not supported.
The process failed.\nIf it continues to fail, the device might be defective. Please contact the device reseller.
Exiting because other application is using Osaifu-Keitai functions and cannot continue.
Please try again after updating Osaifu-Keitai app.
The process is not complete due to server maintenance.\nPlease try again in a while.
The network failed and the process may not be completed.\nPlease check the network status and try again.
The process failed and cannot continue.
Google Play services is not latest or disabled.\nPlease update or enable Google Play services and try again.
Google Play Store is not latest or disabled.\nPlease update or enable Google Play Store and sign in, then try again.
The process failed.\nIf it continues to fail, the device might be defective. Please contact the device reseller.

Failed to access the phone storage.
Close this application.
May caused by shortage of available space.
(030903)

Processing failed.
Close this application.

Check Mobile FeliCa Client(app) is NOT disabled, and restart this application.
Osaifu-Keitai function is not initialized.\nClose this application.\n(030105)
Osaifu-Keitai function is occupied by other application.\nClose this application.\n(030906)
The card was uploaded.\n\nThe current Google account is needed to download this card on Osaifu-Keitai app.
The installing Mobile FeliCa Client is necessary. Access the Google Play?
The installing Osaifu-Keitai setting application is necessary. Access the Google Play?

The card is downloaded.

For tapping the downloaded card, confirm "confirm and switch maincard".
Return to My Services.
There are services with remaining e-money balance.\nDepending on the service, the remaining balance may not be transferred.\nDo you want to proceed?
Osaifu-Keitai is in the initial state.\nThere is no need to erase.
Set permission in the next screen to receive notifications. Do you want to display the setting screen?
You will not receive app notifications with current settings.\nIn the next screen, select \"Allow\" to receive notifications.
The upgrade to the latest version is necessary. Access the Google Play?

Failed to download card.
You may be able to download the card if you perform operations such as refund on an existing transit IC card in the issuer app.
Return to My Services.
(032008)

Unable to download additional transit IC card of the same service.
You may be able to download the card if you perform operations such as refund on an existing card of the same type in the issuer app.
Return to My Services.
(032009)

Unable to download additional transit IC card of the same type in this handset.
You may be able to download the card if you perform operations such as refund on an existing card of the same type in the issuer app.
Return to My Services.
(032010)

Failed to download card.
Reload by pressing the button on the top right corner of the screen and try again. If download still fails, You may be able to download the card if you perform operations such as refund on an existing card in the issuer app.
Return to My Services.
(032011)
Failed to upload card.\nReturn to My Services.\n(032003)
To continue using transit IC card in this smartphone, please set another transit IC card as maincard.\n\n*) Upload transit IC card after exiting ticket gates or getting off buses e.t.c.

There is no applicable card.
Please confirm if this card is issued on this device or stored on the server.
My Services will be displayed.
(032105)
\"Sign in with Google\" is required to display the corresponding card.\nMy Services will be displayed.\n(032201)

There is no applicable card.
Please confirm if this card is issued on this device or stored on the server.
My Services will be displayed.
(032104)
There is no target card of the service, or needed \"Sign in with Google\" to display.\nMy Services will be displayed.\n(032107)
There is no target card of the service, or needed \"Sign in with Google\" to display.\nMy Services will be displayed.\n(032106)
Failed to switch to maincard.\nReturn to My Services.\n(032005)
The handset being used does not support this card issuer service.\nReturn to My Services.\n(032109)

Uploading the card was failed.
Retry uploading after exiting ticket gates or getting off the bus, etc.
Return to My Services.
(032112)
Failed to updating the information. \nRetry after exiting ticket gates or getting off the bus, etc.\n(032151)

Failed to download card.
Retry downloading after a while. If it fails, this card might be undownloadable at the issuer of this card.
Return to My Services.
(032004)

Failed to download card.
You may be able to download the card if you perform operations such as refund on the existing transit IC card in the issuer app.
Return to My Services.
(032013)
Failed to \"Sign in with Google\".\nPlease retry from top-left on display of Osaifu-Keitai app.\n(032016)
Failed to retrieve memory usage status.\nRetry after a while.

System in maintenance. Display information might not be the most updated, or processing might not be complete. Retry or press the button on the top right corner of the screen, by being in a place with better communication condition, or after a while.\n(032001)
Failed to update status.\nReturn to My Services.\n(032006)

Communication failed. Display information might not be the most updated, or processing might not be complete. Retry or press the button on the top right corner of the screen, by being in a place with better communication condition, or after a while.\n(032111)

Failed to download card.
You may be able to download the card if you perform operations such as unsubscribe or refund on an existing transit IC card in the issuer app.
Return to My Services.
(032012)
Failed to get card detail information.\n(032017)

Failed to download card.
You may be able to download the card if you perform operations inn the issuer app.
Return to My Services.
(032014)
The handset or its Android OS version being used does not support this card issuer service.\nReturn to My Services.\n(032007)

Cannot open the application.

Check the Browser or Google Play Store is NOT disabled, and restart this application.
(030114)

Processing failed.
Retry after a while or rebooting this handset.
If an IC card is nearby, release it and retry operation.
(030201)

Processing failed.
Retry after a while or rebooting this handset.
If an IC card is nearby, release it and retry operation.
(030905)
Failed to Sign in with Google.\nPlease confirm that the account information is valid.\n(032103)
Processing failed.\nCheck the communication state and retry operation.\n(030209)

Processing failed.
Retry after a while or rebooting this handset.
If an IC card is nearby, release it and retry operation.
(030208)
Processing failed. Check the Google Play Service is the latest version or NOT disabled, and retry operation.\n(030210)

Communication failed. Display information might not be the most updated, or processing might not be complete. Retry or press the button on the top right corner of the screen, by being in a place with better communication condition, or after a while.\n(030206)
Failed to update contents of display.\nCheck the communication state and retry operation.
NFC/Osaifu-Keitai, NFC or \"Reader/Writer, P2P\" need to be enabled. Change the settings of NFC ?
Processing failed. After updating Service Information, Tap the IC Card again.
Failed to launch the application. Retry after updating the application.\n(032152)
Osaifu-Keitai function is occupied.\nRetry after a while.\n(032101)
Processing failed. This IC card or Osaifu-Keitai is not supported.
Osaifu-Keitai function is occupied by other application.\nRetry after closing the application.\n(030901)
\"Sign in with Google\" is required for certain services and confirmation/downloading uploaded card
This device does not have a fingerprint sensor
Too many attempts. Please try again later.
No PIN, pattern, or password set.
This device does not support PIN, pattern, or password.

If you use different Google accounts for each Osaifu-Keitai app and Google Wallet, the cards will be uploaded each time you launch the application.\nPlease set the same Google account regardless of the application which you use.
You can set to read IC card only on this “Read IC card balance” screen, or on any other screens.
Tap a IC card.\nDisplay balance of a Card.
Click here to stop this display
Receive usage notifications and useful information.
Enable the function to read IC card balance on hand, without opening app
Function to read IC card balance on hand is available.

For using iD, QUICPay, Mobile Suica, Mobile PASMO and Mobile ICOCA, login with Google account is required. Press \"Sign in with Google\" in the next screen, and choose the account in the screen after next.
About Osaifu-Keitai app\nSign in with Google
Tap the service which you want.
\"Sign in with Google\" is required for certain services and confirmation/downloading uploaded card.
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
Accept the Terms of Service and User Agreement and handling of personal information defined in them.
Terms of Service and User Agreement
Sign in with your Google account,\nand the process will continue.
Start date selection: %1$s – End date selection: %2$s
Tap to switch to Calendar view
Tap to switch to year view
Setting of Google account switch notification
Settings of automatically read IC card balance
Read IC card balance without launching application.
Setting to limit screen for reading IC card
Setting to stop collecting tap information
Choose type of transit IC card for downloading
e-Money balance Terms of Service and User Agreement
Request for deleting related account information
Osaifu-Keitai app Terms of Service and User Agreement
Your configured card has been uploaded due to switch of the Google account.

If change account, currently using cards might not be tapped and uploaded cards might not be downloaded.

*) If change account after entering ticket gate (moving) or while on board buses e.t.c., exiting ticket gate or fare settlement of transit IC card cannot be done.
So change account after exiting ticket gate or getting off buses e.t.c.
Updating status of cards\n(communicating with server)

When downloading this card on Osaifu-Keitai app, it is necessary to setup to the smartphone and \"Sign in with Google\" with Google account above after model change. Please record and keep the account information.
This transit IC card will be uploaded to the transit card issuer system. Please confirm the notes below and press Upload.
Please confirm how to transfer in each service in their perspective webpages.
Please transfer E-money services before erase.
All iD and QUICPay cards issued from this device will be deleted, even if it is not listed above.
All iD and QUICPay cards issued from this device will be deleted.
The following transit cards are registered.
Please transfer cards before erasing data for Osaifu-Keitai services.
Terms of Service and User Agreement is confirmed
Into Osaifu-Keitai,\nyou can put together multiple cards,\nso you don\'t have to carry them.
Confirmation or switchng of the main card
Terms of Service and User Agreement is confirmed.
Please take a look our mobile application.
Terms of Service and User Agreement
About Sign in with Google in the Osaifu-Keitai app
Confirmation or switching of the main card
Choose transit IC card to download
The displayed card information may not be correct.
It is necessary for tapping the handset.
FeliCa Services are not available because the function is locked.\nUnlock is necessary for confirmation and downloading uploaded card)
Need set up and register each services which you want.
No service to display in Notice.
No service to display in Recommend.
Before using Osaifu-Keitai app, please unsplit the screen and agree to the \"Terms of Service and User Agreement\" and \"handling of personal information\" in the Terms of Service and User Agreement.
